title: Suspicion Falls on the Straw Hats
description: While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.
scene: Across pages 20, 21, 22, 23, this part follows Iceburg, Nico Robin, Luffy, Paulie, Nami. While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Iceburg- San Remem- Bered Two People

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Whether you came for his life or

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: You decided to after meeting him...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't know how pirates think.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He wouldn't dare die by their hands!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You know the meaning of these words.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: You don't know Nico Robin like we do

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: So don't talk about her like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: They tried to kill our Hero!!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: You're one of them, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Really!!? Don't let her get away!!

summary: While the crew tries to move forward, Water Seven’s political tension around Iceburg and Robin deepens.
